case.title: ADELMAN v. LOWER MINNESOTA RIVER WATERSHED DISTRICT

opinion.h: ADELMAN v. LOWER MINNESOTA RIVER WATERSHED DISTRICT, 382 U.S. 108 (1965)
ADELMAN ET AL. v. LOWER MINNESOTA RIVER WATERSHED DISTRICT. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MINNESOTA. No. 512. Decided November 15, 1965.
opinion.p: 271 Minn. 216, 135 N.W.2d 670, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h: WILSON v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE, 382 U.S. 108 (1965)
opinion.p: 382 U.S. 108 WILSON v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE FIFTH CIRCUIT. No. 520. Decided November 15, 1965.
340 F.2d 609, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
Solicitor General Marshall, Acting Assistant Attorney General Roberts and Melva M. Graney for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
